notes: Recognizably the same posed squid but rendered as jagged photo-traced edges with scattered noise rather than clean FAO ink linework.
specific_issues: broken jagged silhouette from edge-trace artifacts
long whip tentacles from the photo are missing/truncated
stipple is scattered noise, not concentrated in chromatophore fields
no ring suckers along the arms
eye is a tiny mark rather than an almond with filled pupil
double/parallel outline echoes around the mantle and fins
arms appear merged and reduced in count versus the photo
lacks single-weight continuous ink contour characteristic of FAO plates
